instruction: Store a new user in the user-repository.
output:
```aro
(SaveUser: Example) {
    Create the <user> with { id: 1, name: "Example" }.
    Store the <user> into the <user-repository>.
    Return an <OK: status> with <user>.
}
```

instruction: Retrieve a user from the user-repository by id.
output:
```aro
(GetUser: Example) {
    Create the <key> with 42.
    Retrieve the <user> from the <user-repository> where <id> is <key>.
    Return an <OK: status> with <user>.
}
```

instruction: Delete a user from the user-repository by id.
output:
```aro
(DeleteUser: Example) {
    Create the <key> with 42.
    Delete the <user> from the <user-repository> where <id> is <key>.
    Return an <OK: status> for the <deletion>.
}
```

instruction: List all user records from the user-repository.
Observe changes on the user-repository and log every change.
output:
```aro
(Audit User Changes: user-repository Observer) {
    Extract the <user> from the <event: user>.
    Log <user> to the <console>.
    Return an <OK: status> for the <audit>.
}
```

Define a user-defined action that doubles a number.
output:
```aro
(DoubleValue: Action takes <number>) {
    Extract the <n> from the <input: number>.
    Compute the <doubled> from <n> * 2.
    Return an <OK: status> with { doubled: <doubled> }.
}
```

instruction: Define a user-defined action that squares a number.
output:
```aro
(SquareValue: Action takes <number>) {
    Extract the <n> from the <input: number>.
    Compute the <squared> from <n> * <n>.
    Return an <OK: status> with { squared: <squared> }.
}
```

instruction: Define a user-defined action that returns the length of a string.
output:
```aro
(StringLength: Action takes <text>) {
    Extract the <s> from the <input: text>.
    Compute the <len: length> from <s>.
    Return an <OK: status> with { length: <len> }.
}
```

instruction: Define a user-defined action that uppercases a string.
output:
```aro
(UpperCase: Action takes <text>) {
    Extract the <s> from the <input: text>.
    Compute the <upper: uppercase> from <s>.
    Return an <OK: status> with { upper: <upper> }.
}
```

instruction: Define a user-defined action that adds two numbers from an object input.
output:
```aro
(AddPair: Action) {
    Extract the <a> from the <input: a>.
    Extract the <b> from the <input: b>.
    Compute the <sum> from <a> + <b>.
    Return an <OK: status> with { sum: <sum> }.
}
```

instruction: Compose two user-defined actions: sum then double.
output:
```aro
(DoubleValue: Action takes <number>) {
    Extract the <n> from the <input: number>.
    Compute the <doubled> from <n> * 2.
    Return an <OK: status> with { doubled: <doubled> }.
}

(SumAndDouble: Action) {
    Extract the <a> from the <input: a>.
    Extract the <b> from the <input: b>.
    Compute the <sum> from <a> + <b>.
    Application.DoubleValue the <inner> from <sum>.
    Extract the <result> from the <inner: doubled>.
    Return an <OK: status> with { result: <result> }.
}
```

```aro
(Send Confirmation: OrderCreated Handler) {

    Log <order> to the <console>.
    Return an <OK: status> for the <handling>.
}
```

instruction: Emit a UserSignedUp event with a user.
output:
```aro
(Process User: Example) {
```
